# Task 02: Populate Snapshots

## Goal
Populate the three data snapshot files using current public information.

## Read
- `AGENTS.md`
- all files under `assets/silver/data/`

## Edit only
- `assets/silver/data/market_snapshot.md`
- `assets/silver/data/macro_snapshot.md`
- `assets/silver/data/sentiment_snapshot.md`

## Do not edit
- thesis files
- signals files
- trades files
- journal files

## Requirements
- Include a timestamp in each file
- Separate raw facts from interpretation
- Include source links
- If data is missing or uncertain, state it clearly

## Output format per file
- Timestamp
- Raw facts
- Interpretation
- Uncertainty (if needed)
- Sources

## Rules
- Do not invent data
- Prefer primary or high-quality sources
- Avoid mixing inconsistent timestamps without noting it
